user.title: LCARdS
user.description: LCARdS will automatically register its frontend resources. Use the Configure button on the integration card to adjust options.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of LCARdS is allowed.

data_description.show_panel: Display the LCARdS Config panel in the Home Assistant sidebar.
data_description.sidebar_title: Label shown in the sidebar. Default: LCARdS Config
data_description.sidebar_icon: Material Design icon, e.g. mdi:space-invaders. Default: mdi:space-invaders
data_description.log_level: Controls both frontend (browser console) and backend (HA logger) verbosity. The page URL parameter ?lcards_log_level= overrides this for the current session.
